mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recurring_items (uuid_user, uuid_category, type, name, amount, billing_day) VALUES (#{uuidUser}, #{uuidCategory}, #{type}, #{name}, #{amount}, #{billingDay})
mapper.select: SELECT r.uuid, r.uuid_user, r.uuid_category, r.type, r.name, r.amount, r.billing_day, r.is_active, r.created_at, r.deleted_at, c.code AS category_code, c.name AS category_name FROM recurring_items r JOIN categories c ON r.uuid_category = c.uuid WHERE r.is_active = 1 AND r.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT r.uuid, r.uuid_user, r.uuid_category, r.type, r.name, r.amount, r.billing_day, r.is_active, r.created_at, r.deleted_at, c.code AS category_code, c.name AS category_name FROM recurring_items r JOIN categories c ON r.uuid_category = c.uuid WHERE r.uuid = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE recurring_items
uuid_category = #{uuidCategory}, name = #{name}, amount = #{amount}, billing_day = #{billingDay}, is_active = #{isActive},
WHERE uuid = #{uuid} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE recurring_items SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE uuid = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
